# Lessons Learned Register

## Purpose
Capture outcomes, root causes, and actionable recommendations to improve future projects.

## Audience
Project Manager, PMO, Continuous Improvement Lead, Delivery Teams.

## Inputs
- Retrospective notes (`docs/templates/product/retro-notes-template-agile.md`).
- Closure report (`docs/templates/governance/closure-report-template-waterfall.md`).
- Status and quality reports.

## Capture Prompts
- What went well, and why?
- What did not go well, and what was the root cause?
- What actions should be repeated, avoided, or institutionalized?
- Which lessons are transferable to other projects or teams?

## Lessons Learned Entries
| Lesson ID | Project Phase | Description | Root Cause | Outcome (Success/Failure) | Recommended Action | Applicability to Future Projects |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  |  |  |  |  |  |  |

## Completion Checklist
- [ ] Each lesson includes root cause and recommended action.
- [ ] Outcomes capture both successes and failures.
- [ ] Applicability is noted for reuse across projects.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Lessons learned are actionable and linked to measurable outcomes.
- Entries are reviewed and shared with relevant teams.
